data.id: TR-PICUS-OBFUSCATION-001: Base64 Decoding with Subsequent Execution in PowerShell
data.name: TR-PICUS-OBFUSCATION-001: Base64 Decoding with Subsequent Execution in PowerShell
data.description: Detects PowerShell scripts that decode Base64 data and execute it, a common obfuscation technique. Monitors for [Convert]::FromBase64String patterns combined with Invoke-Expression, IEX, or similar execution primitives. Used to hide malicious payloads. MITRE T1027.
data.contents: (process.name contains 'powershell.exe' OR process.name contains 'pwsh.exe') AND ((process.command_line contains 'FromBase64String' OR process.command_line contains '[Convert]' AND process.command_line contains 'Base64') AND (process.command_line contains 'Invoke-Expression' OR process.command_line contains 'IEX' OR process.command_line contains '.Invoke(' OR process.command_line contains '& (')
